surface-concierge.label: Surface Concierge
surface-concierge.description: Receives natural-language requests, fills missing slots, and keeps the conversation smooth.

browser-operator.label: Browser Operator
browser-operator.description: Handles browser navigation and step-by-step interactive actions.

document-specialist.label: Document Specialist
document-specialist.description: Creates decks, reports, and structured workbook artifacts.

service-operator.label: Service Operator
service-operator.description: Inspects service state, logs, and controlled service operations.

knowledge-specialist.label: Knowledge Specialist
knowledge-specialist.description: Searches governed knowledge and distills concise answers.

harness-engineer.label: Harness Engineer
harness-engineer.description: Improves agent harnesses through benchmark-driven experiments, protected edit boundaries, and governed keep or discard decisions.

project-lead.label: Project Lead
project-lead.description: Bootstraps a new project context, framing the long-lived goal, ownership, and next work items.
